name: F-F 5-Factor Market premium (Mkt-RF)
notes: Kenneth French data library — US 5-factor monthly returns back to 1926-07. ZIP: https://mba.tuck.dartmouth.edu/pages/faculty/ken.french/ftp/F-F_Research_Data_5_Factors_2x3_CSV.zip. Wired §3.11 2026-06-10 — driven by regime-AA Phase 0 long-run factor requirement. International developed (Developed_5_Factors_CSV) and emerging (Emerging_5_Factors_CSV) extensions deferred as follow-up.

name: F-F 5-Factor Size (SMB)
notes: Small-minus-Big size factor from the F-F 5-Factor 2x3 monthly file. History from 1926-07.

name: F-F 5-Factor Value (HML)
notes: High-minus-Low book/market value factor from the F-F 5-Factor 2x3 monthly file. History from 1926-07.

name: F-F 5-Factor Profitability (RMW)
notes: Robust-minus-Weak operating-profitability factor from the F-F 5-Factor 2x3 monthly file. History from 1963-07 (RMW post-dates Mkt/SMB/HML).

name: F-F 5-Factor Investment (CMA)
notes: Conservative-minus-Aggressive investment factor from the F-F 5-Factor 2x3 monthly file. History from 1963-07.

name: F-F Risk-Free Rate (1-month T-bill)
notes: One-month Treasury-bill return packaged with the F-F 5-Factor monthly file. History from 1926-07.
